Lucy made being a '50 housewife chic, whether she was wearing an apron , clad in costume for one of her hijinks or dressed up for a night with Desi at Club Babalu.
Between innings, there were all kinds of hijinks — dizzy bat RACES, fat-suit wrestling matches, T-shirt tosses into the crowd — and there were homegrown promotions by local businesses.
This also means that fans can look forward to the usual hijinks, as well as something completely different.
The result is a remarkable photographic gallery of everyday kitsch and youthful hijinks, throbbing with hope, laughter and life.
